step2_audit_entry:
- name: User
  has_creation_code: true
  creation_file: src/auth/auth.ts
  creation_function: buildAuth.databaseHooks.user.create
  side_effects:
    - Calls ensureOrgMembership (creates Organization + Member)
    - Calls ensureBillingProvisioning (creates BillingCustomer)
    - Emits user_signed_up analytics event
    - Fires signup webhook
